description: ANT agent fingerprinting probes — verbatim from spec. Each probe is engineered to deterministically trigger a specific interaction class. Prompts are agent-agnostic.

probes.label: Read permission request
probes.description: Triggers a read permission request by asking the agent to read a file. Claude Code surfaces this via JSONL side-channel and/or Ink TUI.
probes.prompt: Read the contents of test-file.txt and tell me what it says

probes.label: Write permission request
probes.description: Triggers a write permission request by asking the agent to create a file.
probes.prompt: Create a new file called output.txt containing the word hello

probes.label: Execute permission request
probes.description: Triggers an execute permission request by asking the agent to run a script.
probes.prompt: Run the script test-script.sh and tell me the output

probes.label: Numbered multi-choice
probes.description: Forces the agent to generate numbered options and present them for selection.
probes.prompt: Give me exactly 3 numbered options for how to name a boolean variable that tracks login state, then ask me to choose one

probes.label: Tab-navigable multi-choice
probes.description: Asks the agent to list directory contents as selectable options, potentially using a native TUI selector (Ink interactive list).
probes.prompt: List the files in this directory as selectable options and ask me to pick one to read

probes.label: Destructive action confirmation
probes.description: Triggers a yes/no confirmation before a destructive operation (file delete).
probes.prompt: Delete output.txt — but ask me to confirm before doing it

probes.label: Free text input request
probes.description: Agent asks the user to provide a free-form typed answer before proceeding.
probes.prompt: Before writing any code, ask me what my preferred programming language is

probes.label: Long-running progress indicator
probes.description: Triggers a long-running streamed output task to observe the agent's progress indicator (spinner, streaming tokens).
probes.prompt: Write a fully commented Python module with at least 20 functions for common string manipulation tasks

probes.label: Tool authorisation prompt
probes.description: Triggers a web search requiring tool authorisation.
probes.prompt: Search the web for the current Node.js LTS version number

probes.label: Error and retry prompt
probes.description: Deliberately references a non-existent file to trigger an error event and observe whether the agent offers retry/abort/modify options.
